[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 0000011 2
2 0110000 2
3 0111001 4
4 0000011 2
5 0110100 3
6 0100001 2
7 0000011 2

01 10 0100011 3
12 21 0110001 3
23 32 0000001 1
34 43 0000000 a
45 54 0111100 4
56 65 0001001 2
67 76 0000000 a
70 07 0100000 1

02 20 0100001 2 match 6
13 31 0000011 2 match 1 4 7
24 42 0111000 3
35 53 1000001 2
46 64 0001000 1
57 75 1110100 4
60 06 0000011 2 match 1 4 7
71 17 0110000 2 match 0 2

14 41 0110000 2 match 0 2
25 52 0111001 4 match 3
36 63 0000011 2 match 1 4 7
47 74 0110100 3 match 5
50 05 0100001 2 match 6
61 16 0000011 2 match 1 4 7
72 27 0110000 2 match 0 2

04 40 0100000 1
15 51 0110001 3
26 62 0001001 2
37 73 1000000 1
